pages.title: Van Family Medical
pages.text: Van Family Medical, family medicine and telehealth. We serve patients across 11 US states with online doctor and telemedicine consultations, testosterone and hormone therapy, weight-loss injections. Head Office: 488 West Main Ste. 101 Van, Texas 75790. Phone: 903-963-6850.
